methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series G → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.25x) to $41M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 3 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Space & Aerospace. Range: $2.0B - $800.0B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Space & Aerospace P/S median is 45.3x across 6 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

private.name: SpaceX
private.rationale: Same sector (Space & Aerospace), same stage (Series G), post-money $800B

data.narrative:
Dragonfly Aerospace is a Series G space and aerospace company that has raised $20M+ to date. Valuation analysis draws on a comp universe of 5 public equities (RKLB, PL, LUNR, ASTS, SATL) and 8 private peers spanning late-stage funding, including SpaceX, Blue Origin, Rocket Lab, Planet Labs, and Firefly Aerospace.

Two triangulation methods are applicable. Stage-progression uses total raised ($41M proxy) and applies a 1.25x step-up multiplier typical for Series G advancement, yielding $51M. Peer-median across 3 same-sector comparable companies (SpaceX at $800B, Blue Origin at $30B, Vast at $2B) produces a median of $30B, though this range spans three orders of magnitude and reflects substantial dispersion in the comp set. Public-comp anchoring cannot be applied due to absence of target revenue disclosure, which is standard for private companies. The public sector median P/S multiple is 45.3x across the five tickers identified.

The triangulated range spans $44M (low) to $34.5B (high), with a median of $15.0B derived from the two applicable methods. This wide band reflects the structural challenge of valuing early-stage aerospace firms against both mature venture-backed peers and established public markets. Key uncertainties include revenue trajectory, capital intensity of development, and near-term funding environment. Peer comparability remains limited given the bespoke technical and commercial profiles across the aerospace sector.
